enonce.texte:
📝 Exercise 1: Match the computer instruction verbs with their meanings.

Column A (Instructions)

  • 1. Turn on
  • 2. Turn off
  • 3. Type
  • 4. Click
  • 5. Save
  • 6. Print

Column B (Meanings)

  • A. To make a paper copy
  • B. To start a computer
  • C. To write on the keyboard
  • D. To stop a computer
  • E. To keep a file on the computer
  • F. To press a button with the mouse
images: A simple computer with labeled parts: screen, keyboard, mouse, printer

questions.texte: Match each instruction in Column A with its correct meaning in Column B.

sousQuestions.reponse: C. To write on the keyboard
F. To press a button with the mouse
E. To keep a file on the computer
A. To make a paper copy

enonce.texte:
💻 Exercise 2: Read the instructions and answer the questions.

Instructions for using a computer:

  1. First, turn on the computer.
  2. Then, click on the document icon.
  3. Next, type your name in the box.
  4. After that, save your work.
  5. Finally, click on the printer icon to print.

questions.texte: Answer the following questions based on the instructions.

sousQuestions.texte: What is the first thing you should do? (Identify)
What should you click on after turning on the computer? (Identify)
What should you type in the box? (Identify)
sousQuestions.reponse: Type your name in the box.

sousQuestions.texte: What should you do after typing your name? (Identify)
What should you click to print? (Identify)
sousQuestions.reponse: Click on the printer icon to print.

enonce.texte:
✍️ Exercise 3: Complete the instructions with the correct words from the box.

Vocabulary box: click, save, type, turn, print, open, close

1. First, _______ on the computer.

2. Next, _______ the file.

3. Then, _______ your homework.

4. _______ on the save icon to keep your work.

5. Finally, _______ the document.

6. To make a paper copy, _______ the document.

7. When you finish, _______ the computer.

questions.texte: Complete each instruction with the correct word from the vocabulary box.
questions.reponse: 1. turn, 2. open, 3. type, 4. Click, 5. save, 6. print, 7. close

sousQuestions.texte: Sentence 4: _______ on the save icon to keep your work.
Sentence 6: To make a paper copy, _______ the document.
Sentence 7: When you finish, _______ the computer.

enonce.texte:
🗣️ Exercise 4: Complete the dialogue between a student and a teacher.

Dialogue:

Student: Excuse me, ___________ do I open a file?

Teacher: ___________ on the file icon on the screen.

Student: Where ___________ save my work?

Teacher: You save it in the documents folder.

Student: ___________ do I print my document?

Teacher: ___________ on the printer icon.
images: A student asking a teacher for help at a computer, classroom setting

questions.texte: Complete the dialogue with the correct words.

sousQuestions.texte: Student: Excuse me, ___________ do I open a file?
Teacher: ___________ on the file icon on the screen.
Student: ___________ do I print my document?

enonce.texte:
📖 Exercise 5: Read the scenario and write step-by-step instructions.

Scenario: Your friend wants to type a letter on the computer and print it. You need to give them instructions. The computer is already on.

Instructions to give:

  • Open the document
  • Type the letter
  • Save the document
  • Print the document
images: A student helping a friend use a computer, collaborative learning environment

questions.texte: Write step-by-step instructions for your friend. Use sequence markers (first, then, next, after that, finally).
questions.reponse:
Example answer:

First, open a new document by clicking on the document icon.
Then, type your letter using the keyboard.
Next, click on the save icon to save your document. Give it a name.
After that, check your letter for any mistakes.
Finally, click on the printer icon to print your letter.
Remember to turn off the computer when you finish.
